key_signals: All regime signals are bull and price is above AVWAP/RVWAP on every timeframe: ema_trend_regime 15m bull, 4h bull, 1d bull; AVWAP future 2068.91 with price 2111.1; 4h RVWAP 2105.6601; 1d RVWAP 2085.4528.

Intraday participation re-accelerated after the pullback: latest 15m CVD delta_fut +3450.171 and delta_spot +140.8937, 4h CVD delta_fut +38337.315 and delta_spot +3101.379, while 4h whale delta is +9944248.93714 and 1d whale delta is +149149965.59661.

Profile location stays constructive: price is above 1d TPO VAH 2103.86, above 4h TPO POC 2108.51, and above 15m value VAH 2110.6, but immediate resistance remains 1d VAH 2115.21 and the 2115.26-2116.35 single-print zone.
Responsive sellers are active near the top of the auction: buying_exhaustion fired at 2110.17 and 2110.32 with scores 1.0, 0.9981, and 0.9984, and bearish_absorption printed at 2114.31 and 2107.2.
flow_context.story: I anchored the flow to structure first. Current futures price is 2111.1, which sits above 1d TPO VAH 2103.86, above 4h TPO POC 2108.51, and above 15m price-volume VAH 2110.6, so the correct read is an above-value continuation context rather than a below-value liquidation context. CVD bias is bullish on the actionable windows: latest 15m cvd_pack shows delta_fut +3450.171, delta_spot +140.8937, relative_delta_fut 0.1150, relative_delta_spot 0.0805; 4h shows delta_fut +38337.315 and delta_spot +3101.379 after the prior 4h bar already printed +35591.616 and +682.276; the 7d slopes are positive with cvd_slope_fut 174.1212 and cvd_slope_spot 10.3181. The only CVD counterpoint is the partial 1d bar, which is negative at delta_fut -22903.317 and delta_spot -5920.7228, so daily flow is softer than the 4h and 15m flows. Whale flow is split by horizon but net constructive: 15m whale_trades are bearish with fut_whale_delta_notional -4340902.90454 and 5 buys versus 10 sells, yet 4h whale flow is bullish at +9944248.93714 and 1d whale flow is strongly bullish at +149149965.59661, with spot whales also positive on 1d at +1669809.9748. VPIN does not show a toxic sell regime: vpin_fut is 0.5244224 with z_vpin_fut -2.3599 and 15m z_vpin_fut -2.4155, so toxicity_state is medium but statistically low versus history, which is neutral to supportive for continuation. TPO/profile bias is bullish to neutral: 1d tpo_poc is 2101.41, tpo_vah 2103.86, tpo_val 2084.31 and price is above value; 4h tpo_poc is 2108.51, tpo_vah 2112.68, tpo_val 2101.34 and price is in the upper half of value; the 1d price-volume VAH 2115.21 and the TPO single-print zone 2115.26-2116.35 are the immediate cap. Absorption is two-sided but structurally constructive: bullish_absorption clustered at 2097.91, 2100.09, 2101.67, and 2104.52 defended the lower support band, while bearish_absorption at 2107.2 and 2114.31 marks overhead supply. Exhaustion is also two-sided: selling_exhaustion at 2107.21 score 0.9030 and 2097.6 score 0.7490 helped form higher lows, but buying_exhaustion at 2110.17 score 1.0 and 2110.32 scores 0.9981 and 0.9984 shows responsive sellers leaning on the market before the daily 2115.21 to 2116.35 ceiling. Orderbook context is still net supportive with snapshot obi_fut +0.2977, depth_imbalance_1pct +0.4274, and microprice 2110.73 to 2110.74, but an ask wall sits at 2116.86. Net result: the dominant cross-timeframe flow is bullish, yet the market is late in the current intraday leg and is running into clear overhead supply, so upside continuation is favored only while price holds above value and support zones.

stage_1_setup_scan_json.market_narrative: ETHUSDT is in aligned higher-timeframe uptrends: the 1d and 4h are both above value, above AVWAP, above RVWAP, and supported by positive whale participation and positive 4h CVD. The 15m is not a fresh impulse leg; it is a bullish recovery from a pullback that has re-accepted above local value and the EMA/RVWAP stack. That keeps the overall market state bullish, but the current auction is pressing into nearby resistance and repeated seller response around 2110 to 2116. In plain terms: higher timeframe trend is up, intraday structure is still up, but short-term flow is no longer clean because responsive sellers are active just under the daily upper boundary. The dominant context is bullish continuation with local overhead friction, not bearish trend reversal.

15m.story: I anchored the 15m read to local structure before interpreting flow. Current futures price is 2111.1. The 15m price-volume profile has POC 2108.0, VAH 2110.6, and VAL 2106.74; the latest closed 15m candle at 07:00 printed high 2112.97 and low 2106.52. That is why I bracket the near-term range with support 2106.74 and resistance 2112.97. The current 4h-session TPO development also places price in upper value with tpo_dev_poc 2108.51, tpo_dev_vah 2112.68, and tpo_dev_val 2101.34. The trend label is Bullish because price is above the EMA stack with EMA13 2109.45, EMA21 2108.63, EMA34 2107.81; ema_trend_regime marks 15m bull; price is above 15m RVWAP 2109.2843 with z_price_minus_rvwap 0.92 and still below the +2 band 2112.5627; and price is far above 7d AVWAP 2068.91 by 42.19. Participation also turned back up into the current print: latest 15m cvd_pack shows delta_fut +3450.171, delta_spot +140.8937, relative_delta_fut 0.1150, relative_delta_spot 0.0805; footprint window_delta is +4646.733 with stacked_buy true; and the book snapshot is bid-leaning with obi_fut +0.2977, depth_imbalance_1pct +0.4274, and microprice 2110.73 to 2110.74. Contradicting signals are real and I am explicitly overriding them, which is why agreement is only mixed. Whale_trades 15m is net sell with fut_whale_delta_notional -4340902.90454, fut_buy_count 5, and fut_sell_count 10. The 15m orderbook TWA is softer than the snapshot with obi_fut -0.08597, spot_confirm false, and cross_cvd_attribution -4482.1068. Buying_exhaustion fired repeatedly at pivot_price 2110.32 at 06:21 with score 0.9981, at pivot_price 2110.17 at 06:06 with score 1.0, and again at pivot_price 2110.32 at 07:09 with score 0.9984. Bearish_absorption printed at pivot_price 2114.31 with score 0.7621 and at 2107.2 with score 0.8073. The latest divergence signal is bearish_divergence from 05:24 to 05:41 with price_diff 2.43, cvd_diff_fut -1.5958, and score 0.5378, although spot_price_flow_confirm is false. I overrode those bearish signals because they are located at or just below overhead structure, not at broken support: sellers responded into the upper zone, but the market held above 2106.74 to 2108.51 and earlier downside probes were defended by selling_exhaustion at 2107.21 score 0.9030 and bullish_absorption at 2104.52 score 0.5781, 2101.67 score 0.6772, and 2097.91 score 0.6715. So the 15m is still bullish, but it is a contested bullish auction rather than a clean one-way move.

1d.story: I anchored the daily read to daily structure first. Current futures price is 2111.1. The 1d TPO profile has tpo_poc 2101.41, tpo_vah 2103.86, and tpo_val 2084.31, while the 1d price-volume profile has POC 2096.0, VAH 2115.21, and VAL 2074.7. Price is therefore above daily TPO value and just below the daily volume VAH, so I bracket the daily range with support 2103.86 and resistance 2115.21. The trend is Bullish because the daily structure is still advancing: daily closes stepped higher from 2035.39 on 2026-03-10 to 2050.99 on 2026-03-11, 2072.6 on 2026-03-12, 2091.01 on 2026-03-13, 2095.27 on 2026-03-14, and current price is 2111.1. Price is 42.19 above 7d AVWAP future 2068.91, above 1d RVWAP 2085.4528 with z_price_minus_rvwap 1.78, and the EMA regime is bull with 1d EMA100 1919.99 and EMA200 1880.89 far below market. Daily participation still favors the bull side: whale_trades 1d show fut_whale_delta_notional +149149965.59661 with 541 buys versus 438 sells, spot_whale_delta_notional +1669809.9748, and footprint 1d window_delta +88838.491. Funding is not crowded long; funding_summary shows consecutive_direction_hours -28 with ema_24h -0.00003256 and ema_8h -0.00002440, which supports a bullish daily label rather than warning of euphoric overextension. Liquidation_density also leans bullish with short_total 1784046.80262 versus long_total 911403.56196, leaving more short-side fuel above than long-side fuel below. Contradicting signals do exist and I am naming them. The current partial 1d CVD bar is negative with delta_fut -22903.317, delta_spot -5920.7228, relative_delta_fut -0.01066, and relative_delta_spot -0.03877. Near-term upper-boundary flow is also defensive: bearish_absorption printed at 2114.31 and buying_exhaustion fired at 2110.17 and 2110.32 with scores 1.0, 0.9981, and 0.9984. I overrode those bearish cues because they are happening as price approaches the daily upper boundary and the single-print zone at 2115.26 to 2116.35, not after a break of daily support. Daily structure remains above value, above AVWAP, above RVWAP, and supported by strong whale flow and positive daily footprint delta. So the daily trend remains bullish even though the current day is pressing into resistance and showing some local seller response.

4h.story: I anchored the 4h read to 4h structure before using flow. Current futures price is 2111.1. The 4h price-volume profile has POC 2107.0, VAH 2114.79, and VAL 2102.18. The current 4h TPO session has tpo_poc 2108.51, tpo_vah 2112.68, and tpo_val 2101.34. That places price above both major 4h control points and inside the upper half of current value, so I bracket the 4h range with support 2102.18 and resistance 2114.79. The trend label is Bullish because the recent 4h bar sequence is making higher lows and higher closes: 2072.65, 2073.55, 2076.25, 2095.27, and current 2111.1, with the current 4h bar already printing high 2116.35. Price is above 4h RVWAP 2105.6601 with z_price_minus_rvwap 0.93 and far above 4h AVWAP 2068.46. Participation supports the move: 4h cvd_pack shows current delta_fut +38337.315 and delta_spot +3101.379 after the prior 4h bar already posted +35591.616 and +682.276, with both relative deltas positive; whale_trades 4h are net buy with fut_whale_delta_notional +9944248.93714 and 98 buys versus 93 sells; footprint 4h window_delta is +17060.401; and ema_trend_regime is bull with 4h EMA100 2026.62 and EMA200 2001.84 below price. Contradicting signals are present but they do not outweigh the broader 4h structure. Bearish_absorption at 2114.31 and repeated buying_exhaustion at 2110.17 to 2110.32 show responsive sellers near the top of the current 4h auction. The orderbook also shows an immediate ask wall at 2116.86 and another at 2126.78, and the current session has a TPO single-print zone overhead at 2115.02 to 2116.35. I overrode those bearish cues because they are occurring at upper resistance, while the pullback side was defended lower down by bullish_absorption at 2097.91 and 2104.52 and by selling_exhaustion at 2097.6 and 2107.21. There are also no active 4h bear FVGs overhead. So the 4h remains bullish with higher value and positive participation, even though the market is now leaning into the top of the current 4h auction and may need to digest before another leg higher.
